message:
fix: audit batch 219 — 2 files fixed across 8 audited (7534L)

Batch 219 (7534L, 8 files): trace/filter.rs 1L (xorshift zero fixed-point
  when seed is u64::MAX causes all sampled events to be dropped — added zero
  guard), distributed/distribution.rs 1M (as u32 truncation of symbols.len()
  — now uses u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX)), runtime/reactor/kqueue.rs
  SOUND, http/h1/server.rs SOUND, lab/oracle/mod.rs SOUND, types/builder.rs
  SOUND, channel/fault.rs SOUND, combinator/bracket.rs SOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -310,7 +310,7 @@ impl SymbolDistributor {
 
         DistributionResult {
             object_id: encoded.params.object_id,
-            symbols_distributed: encoded.symbols.len() as u32,
+            symbols_distributed: u32::try_from(encoded.symbols.len()).unwrap_or(u32::MAX),
             acks,
             failures,
             quorum_achieved: quorum_result.quorum_met,
